entity.summary: Solana proprietary automated market maker with a live first-party application and substantial current spot-trading volume.
entity.notes: The first-party application remains reachable. Current DEX data reports substantial 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day Solana volume, supporting a clear active classification even though a separate TVL figure is not presented on the profile.

evidence.title: Aquifer DEX official application
evidence.notes: The current first-party JavaScript application remains reachable and preserves the Aquifer DEX identity.

evidence.title: Aquifer protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Aquifer as a Solana proprietary AMM.

evidence.title: Aquifer DEX volume discovery entry
evidence.notes: Current Solana DEX-volume data reports substantial recent trading activity, supporting an active classification.
